title: axonopus hagenbeckianus
intro: Axonopus hagenbeckianus, also known as the bent grass or elephant grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Axonopus hagenbeckianus include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and inflammation due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Axonopus hagenbeckianus is used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to treat various ailments, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
